REDCapExploreR 0.1.0
  • Get Started
  • Reference

REDCapExploreR: Exploratory Data Quality Tools for REDCap Projects

Source: R/REDCapExploreR-package.R
REDCapExploreR-package.Rd

Provides tools to explore REDCap projects, summarize project structure, and flag common data quality issues for data managers.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://chop-cgtinformatics.github.io/REDCapExploreR/

  • https://github.com/CHOP-CGTInformatics/REDCapExploreR

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/CHOP-CGTInformatics/REDCapExploreR/issues
